title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at Dove India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at Dove India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dove India South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dove India South Asia Partners:
Dove India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dove India South Asia Partners!
